memberdef.name: EVTCHNSTAT_interdomain
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Channel is connected to remote domain. */

memberdef.name: EVTCHNSTAT_pirq
memberdef.initializer: 3 /* Channel is bound to a phys IRQ line. */

memberdef.name: EVTCHNSTAT_virq
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* Channel is bound to a virtual IRQ line */

memberdef.name: EVTCHNSTAT_ipi
memberdef.initializer: 5 /* Channel is bound to a virtual IPI line */
